name: Windows Human Approval Demo
description: Demonstrates the human-in-the-loop approval process in Opservant Spark.

tasks.name: Approval Demo Task
tasks.description: Task containing an action that requires approval.

actions.name: Approval Required Action
actions.description: This action requires manual intervention before execution.
actions.command: powershell -Command "Write-Output 'This action was approved by a human.'"
